title: 7A21--IDS (Investigational Drug System) Software
name: IDS (Investigational Drug System) Software
statement_of_work: Vendor shall provide IDS, a secure, HIPAA and 21 CFR Part 11 compliant, web-based application that has the following features: Monitors Receive, Transfer, Dispense, Return to Supplier, Destroy, and Adjustment transactions Manages a comprehensive drug catalog, protocols, patients, suppliers, documents, and pharmacies Generates accountability logs exportable to NCI DARF, NCI ORAL DRAF, ACTG, De-Identified and other format, significantly facilitating the audit process Granular inventory tracking down to an individual Bottle, Vial, or Kit # Patient-specific drug tracking Double signature verification Barcoded inventory labels Physical inventory monitoring Par level management Pharmacy billing Operates as a standalone system but has interfaces available to reduce data entry, including CTMS, EMR, and IRB systems for protocol, patient, and document management; inpatient or outpatient pharmacy s
deliverables: Provide hIPAA and 21 CFR Part 11 compliant
Provide web-based application that has the following features: Monitors Receive
Provide adjustment transactions Manages a comprehensive drug catalog
dept: VETERANS AFFAIRS, DEPARTMENT OF.VETERANS AFFAIRS, DEPARTMENT OF.260-NETWORK CONTRACT OFFICE 20 (36C260)
